lines.text: Ho munda hunda dhuppa vich tan kudiye
Ni tu kade laaye nahiyon ankhiyan ton shade
Aithe jatt paani vi ni paunda sohniye
Tainu teri daaru ch pasand ae lemonade

Ni tu kade laaye nahiyon ankhiyan ton shade
Aithe jatt paani vi ni paunda sohniye
Tainu teri daaru ch pasand ae lemonade
Kudi jivein nikali ae kise romantic gaane cho
Tu labhdi ae Snapchat te munda labhe thaane cho
Main te kara avoid kudi nu oh mangdi mera phone ae
Sadde puthe kam sohniye 24 ghante on ae
Oh jaadon dekhe jattan de subha athre
Tere love shove sare ho jane aa fade

Turi jaandi nu main aawaaz maar ke saddh leya
Betha leya vich gaddi de puchheya kithe chhad deyan
Sangdi sangdi ne ohne haathan naal muh khajj leya
Main keha chalde aa ni yacht private aaj leya
Oh kade billo seaside kaade jet te
Kithe ni tu samjhengi jattan de trade
